message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Update local beads issue tracker with current project state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-1uog","title":"E2E tests: setup UI install flow + manifest ordering","description":"Goal:\n- Add Playwright tests for setup UI flows driven by manifest phases/tags.\n\nScope:\n- Required vs optional tool grouping; phase ordering.\n- Install action triggers correct API calls.\n- Detailed logs (network traces + DOM snapshots).\n\nDefinition of Done:\n- E2E tests pass and produce diagnostic logs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:48:55.923798166Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:14.156638925Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","setup","tests","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1uog","depends_on_id":"bd-1hac","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:48:55.984715237Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1uog","depends_on_id":"bd-2xku","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T05:49:14.156587939Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

- Integrate NTM robot alerts/mail into gateway alerting + snapshot.

- `ntm --robot-alerts` → gateway alerts.
- `ntm --robot-mail` → snapshot mail section (read-only).

Definition of Done:

- Provide minimal built-in registry with core tools.
- Emit user-facing errors with actionable guidance.
- Include structured logs with manifest path + error category.
